name: eval specs: each g-react-001..010 has a corresponding active eval spec at evals/specs/g-react-<id>-*.json that runs the rule against fixtures
command: for i in 001 002 003 004 005 006 007 008 009 010; do ls "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/specs/" | grep -q "g-react-$i" || { echo "FAIL g-react-$i no active eval spec" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
